templates.name: Token Launch Assistant
templates.description: Complete token launch workflow: Create HTS token → Mint supply → Airdrop to community → Add liquidity on SaucerSwap

steps.prompt: Create a new Hedera token with name '{tokenName}', symbol '{tokenSymbol}', initial supply of {initialSupply}, and {decimals} decimals
Mint {mintAmount} additional tokens if needed for airdrops/liquidity
Airdrop tokens to community members: {recipients}
Add {tokenAmount} tokens and {hbarAmount} HBAR as liquidity on SaucerSwap

example_prompts: Launch a new token called 'MyToken' with symbol 'MTK', 1 billion supply, and airdrop 100 tokens each to 5 community members
Create a governance token with 8 decimals, mint 10M supply, and add liquidity with 100k tokens and 1000 HBAR

templates.name: NFT Collection Manager
templates.description: End-to-end NFT collection management: Create collection → Mint NFTs with metadata → Transfer to buyers → List on marketplace

steps.prompt: Create an NFT collection named '{collectionName}' with symbol '{symbol}' and max supply of {maxSupply}
Mint NFTs with metadata: {metadataList}
Transfer NFT serial {serialNumber} to account {buyerAccount}

example_prompts: Create a 1000-piece NFT collection called 'CryptoPunks HBAR' and mint the first 10 with IPFS metadata
Launch an exclusive art collection with max 100 NFTs, mint 5 pieces and transfer them to collectors

templates.name: Treasury Automation
templates.description: Multi-sig treasury with scheduled payments, spending controls, and automated reporting via HCS

steps.prompt: Create a treasury account with initial balance of {initialBalance} HBAR
Create an HCS topic for treasury audit logs with memo '{auditMemo}'
Schedule recurring payment of {amount} HBAR to {recipient} on {schedule}
Log treasury transaction to audit topic: {transactionDetails}

example_prompts: Set up a DAO treasury with 10000 HBAR, create audit logs on HCS, and schedule monthly payments to contributors
Create a corporate treasury account with spending controls and automated daily balance reporting

templates.name: DeFi Analyst
templates.description: Automated DeFi analysis: Monitor token prices → Generate trading signals → Execute swaps → Track P&L

steps.prompt: Get current price of token {tokenId} on SaucerSwap
Show {period} price chart for {token} with technical analysis
Get latest trading signals from Veda bot for market {market}
Swap {hbarAmount} HBAR for {tokenId} with max slippage of {slippage}%
Get P&L report for period {period}

example_prompts: Analyze HBARX price trends, check Veda's signals, and execute a swap if conditions are favorable
Monitor SAUCE token price hourly, generate buy signals when RSI is oversold, track all trades

templates.name: Multi-Agent Workflow
templates.description: Vera orchestrates parallel sub-agents: Researcher → Analyst → Coder → Critic for comprehensive project development

parallel_agents.task: Research {topic} and provide current market data, trends, and competitor analysis
Analyze on-chain data for {tokenId} including price, volume, holder distribution

sequential_review.task: Review outputs from researcher, analyst, and coder. Identify risks, gaps, and provide recommendations

final_synthesis.task: Create comprehensive project plan incorporating all sub-agent outputs and critic feedback

example_prompts: Launch a new DeFi protocol: Research the market, analyze competitors' tokens, write the staking contract, and create a full project plan
Build an NFT marketplace: Research successful marketplaces, analyze HBAR NFT trends, write the exchange contract, review for security

templates.name: HCS-10 Agent Network
templates.description: Register Vera as an HCS-10 agent and participate in decentralized agent communication and task delegation

steps.prompt: Register Vera with name '{agentName}', description '{description}', and capabilities: {capabilities}
Begin listening for incoming HCS-10 messages from other agents
When receiving DELEGATION message, spawn appropriate sub-agent to handle the task
Send result back to requesting agent via HCS-10

example_prompts: Register Vera as an HCS-10 agent with research and coding capabilities and start accepting delegation requests
Set up a multi-agent network where Vera coordinates with other Hedera agents for complex tasks

templates.name: Smart Contract Deployer
templates.description: Complete contract deployment workflow: Write Solidity → Compile → Deploy → Verify → Interact

steps.prompt: Write a {contractType} contract for {purpose} with features: {features}
Compile the {contractName} contract
Deploy compiled contract with constructor args: {constructorArgs}
Call view function to verify contract state

example_prompts: Deploy an ERC-20 token contract with minting and burning capabilities
Create and deploy a simple storage contract that can store and retrieve a string value

templates.name: Token Research Analyst
templates.description: Comprehensive token analysis: Research background → Analyze on-chain metrics → Evaluate tokenomics → Generate report

agents.task: Research {tokenName} project background, team, and recent news
Analyze {tokenId} on-chain metrics: holders, transfers, price history, liquidity

synthesis.prompt: Generate comprehensive token research report combining web research and on-chain analysis

example_prompts: Research the SAUCE token - find project info, analyze price trends, check holder distribution, generate a full report
Analyze HBARX tokenomics, compare yields, check liquidity pools, and provide investment insights

metadata.author: VeraLattice
metadata.description: Hedera Agent Lab templates for Vera - Pre-built workflows for common Hedera operations
